sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n40007" key="e)pilei/xw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιλείχω</orth>, <sense id="n40007.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">lick over, lick,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ev.Luc.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">16.21</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
